title: Long-Distance Relationship Pattern
html: Stub. The structural pattern of Yahir's Emily arc — Austin ↔ Eugene geography forces visit-cadence relationships punctuated by long stretches of phone-only contact. The pattern is visible across the Feb trip planning, the Costa Rica Valentine's letter (Yahir's geography compounds the strain), the Feb 21 doubt spiral (phone-call-not-returned as the trigger), and the March 13–25 Austin visit structure (cram a relationship into 12 days). The geographic constraint isn't the cause of the relationship's decay but it's the conditioning environment for every flashpoint.
